# Chamade Hotel Gent

## Overview
Chamade Hotel Gent is a 3-star boutique hotel with 36 rooms, located at Koningin Elisabethlaan 3, 9000 Ghent, Belgium. It is a two-minute walk from Ghent's main train station (Gent-Sint-Pieters).

## Contact
- Phone: +32 9 395 06 69
- Email: info@chamade.be
- Website: https://www.chamade.be
- Instagram: @chamadehotel
- Address: Koningin Elisabethlaan 3, 9000 Gent, Belgium

## Booking
- Booking engine: https://bookingengine.mylighthouse.com/chamade/Rooms/Select
- Check-in: 15:00 - 22:00 (contact hotel for late arrival)
- Check-out: before 11:00
- Languages: Dutch, English, French

## Room Types
- Deluxe Double: spacious room with double bed, modern bathroom, desk, minibar
- Comfort Double: comfortable double room with ensuite bathroom
- Comfort Twin: twin room with two single beds, ensuite bathroom
- Single Room: cozy single room, ideal for business travelers

## Breakfast
- Fresh daily breakfast with local and organic products
- Served in the breakfast room
- Continental style with hot options available

## Services & Amenities
- Free Wi-Fi
- Green Key certified
- Luggage storage
- City maps and local tips at reception
- Bike rental nearby

## Sustainability
- Green Key certified hotel
- Focus on local and sustainable products
- Energy-efficient building practices

## Guest Reviews
- Booking.com: 9.1/10 (500+ verified reviews)
- Guests praise: excellent breakfast, modern rooms, friendly staff, perfect location near station

## Location
- 2-minute walk from Gent-Sint-Pieters train station
- Close to city center attractions
- City of Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium
